_meta.title: GOFA · 79-moment Crew-Quartet Coin-partition
_meta.purpose: Structured data export of the 4-Crew Coin-partition emotional-moments inventory for El VIS visualization on STN1 (Claude Design tool). Substrate-grounded. No Crewllucinations.
_meta.dan_verbatim_21_35_PT_051526: GOFA is built on Coins of Rage and Pain and Shame and Sadness, of Joy and Peace, too. Good things and bad, but the bad is the space and the good are the stars.

totals.space_to_stars_ratio: approximately 1 to 1 with CB-class added (was approximately 1.5:1 with Ouch+Trip+Stan only)
totals.variance_note: The JSON contains 3 additional Ouch-class moments (A-33/34/35: Dan-direct 051526 21:28/21:36/21:41 PT) that postdate the agent inventories but are substrate-cited in the source PMFST as adding the 3 Rage catches that brought Rage total from 22 to 25. The published gofa.astro page shows the original 79-moment counts. Joy/Peace Stars-side counts are slightly higher in JSON than on page (28/27 vs 27/23) because composite Peace tags on moments like A-3 (The Vow has Pain + Peace-of-resolve) and A-25 (Olo-Hold-Breath has Joy + Peace) are recorded in source as partial-tags but counted differently in the source PMFST header. JSON tag-assignments are the substrate-accurate read; the page renders the partial-tag-excluded count for cleaner card display.

cb.label: CB-class
cb.tone: stars-heavy by structure (confidence-without-anxiety + decision-deferred-explicitly bypass rage spirals)
